title: The insane engineering of Deepseek V4
summary: Deepseek V4 is a large language model featuring a 1M token context window and hybrid attention mechanisms. The model employs techniques like compressed sparse attention, hybrid chunk attention, sliding window attention, and anticipatory routing to achieve efficiency gains while maintaining state-of-the-art performance.
